nasb.text: It shall come about if he says to you, ‘I will not go out from you,’ because he loves you and your household, since he fares well with you;

esv.text: But if he says to you, ‘I will not go out from you,’ because he loves you and your household, since he is well-off with you,

cnv.text: 如果他對你說：‘我不願離開你。’他說這話是因為他愛你和你的家，又因為他喜歡和你相處，

ccb.text: 如果你们的奴隶因为爱你们和你们的家人，与你们相处融洽，不愿意离去，
